mnemonics.title: Lossless Test
mnemonics.explanation: R1 ∩ R2 must be a superkey of R1 or R2 for lossless decomposition

mnemonics.title: BCNF Decomposition Steps
mnemonics.explanation: Find violation, Split into X∪Y and R-(Y-X), Repeat until no violations

mnemonics.title: 3NF vs BCNF
mnemonics.mnemonic: 3NF Preserves Dependencies, BCNF Removes More Redundancy
mnemonics.explanation: Trade-off: 3NF always preserves FDs, BCNF may not but has less redundancy

quickRecall: Lossless: R1 ∩ R2 → R1 or R2
BCNF decomposition: R1 = X∪Y, R2 = R-(Y-X)
